source: National Environment Act 2019, Schedules. Categories are illustrative for road projects -- full Schedules cover all sectors. Verify current Schedule wording from NEMA for project-specific application.

third_schedule.description: EIA mandatory. Projects likely to have significant environmental impacts.

criteria_for_road_projects.criterion: New road construction exceeding 10 km in or through an environmentally sensitive area
Road or bridge construction requiring significant land acquisition and involuntary resettlement
examples: New road alignment through settled area
Road widening requiring demolition of structures (>50 households)

criteria_for_road_projects.criterion: Major bridge construction in environmentally sensitive areas
examples: Bridge over major river in protected area

criteria_for_road_projects.criterion: Road construction involving quarrying, borrow pit extraction, or large-scale earthworks in sensitive areas
examples: Borrow pit in wetland buffer zone

second_schedule.description: Project Brief or summary ESIA required. Projects with potential environmental impacts that may be significant depending on circumstances.

criteria_for_road_projects.criterion: Road rehabilitation or upgrade within existing road corridor
examples: Gravel to paved upgrade in existing alignment
criteria_for_road_projects.outcome: Project Brief required. NEMA may require more detailed study depending on circumstances.

criteria_for_road_projects.criterion: Road construction in non-sensitive areas with minor land acquisition
examples: New access road in agricultural area
Road extension < 10 km not through sensitive area

criteria_for_road_projects.criterion: Bridge replacement or upgrade at existing location
Road drainage improvements involving watercourse modification

first_schedule.description: Exempt from EIA. Projects with negligible environmental impacts.

criteria_for_road_projects.criterion: Routine road maintenance within existing footprint
Minor repairs to existing road furniture
Emergency repairs to restore road access

notes: The National Environment Act 2019 replaced the 1995 Act. Schedule numbering and criteria may differ from the 1995 Act.
NEMA has discretion to reclassify projects based on site-specific circumstances.
These categories are illustrative for road projects only. The full Schedules cover all sectors (mining, industry, agriculture, etc.).
Always verify current Schedule wording from NEMA -- the Act and Regulations are periodically updated.
